CustomField.description:
On creating and updating a supplement rent record- 1. If Last Escalation Date is not blank and Day of Last Escalation Date is not equal to 1st day then we are populating with first date of Last Escalation Date
Calculation on SR Utilization record- 1. If Rate Reset On Last Escalation Date? checkbox is true on supplement rent record then we are using this field value as first escalation date for furhter calculation on supplement rent utilization record. 2. We are updating Last Escalation Date on Supplement rent if Next Escalation Date is in past or less than supplement rent record's Month ending
CustomField.label: Last Escalation Date
